rows.en: I was very tired yesterday.
rows.ja: 私は昨日とても疲れていました。

rows.en: My brother was sick last week.
rows.ja: 私の兄は先週具合が悪かったです。

rows.en: She was nervous before the test.
rows.ja: 彼女はテストの前に緊張していました。

rows.en: The room was quiet after lunch.
rows.ja: その部屋は昼食のあと静かでした。

rows.en: It was cold last night.

rows.en: The sky was gray this morning.

rows.en: Our teacher was absent yesterday.

rows.en: I was sleepy in class.

rows.en: He was kind to me.

rows.en: The soup was hot.

rows.en: My bag was under the desk.

rows.en: The library was empty after school.

rows.en: The park was full of people.

rows.en: I was late for school.

rows.en: The math test was easy.
rows.ja: その数学のテストはやさしかったです。

rows.en: Our seats were near the window.

rows.en: It was sunny all day.

rows.en: The floor was wet.

rows.en: They were hungry after practice.

rows.en: My hands were cold.

rows.en: The store was closed then.

rows.en: The movie was really funny.

rows.en: Her voice was soft.

rows.en: The road was dark last night.

rows.en: We were together all day.

rows.en: The homework was difficult.

rows.en: I was free yesterday afternoon.

rows.en: The classroom was warm.

rows.en: His answer was right.

rows.en: The train was crowded this morning.

rows.en: Our dog was quiet today.
rows.ja: うちの犬は今日はおとなしかったです。

rows.ja: 彼女は夕食のあと皿を洗いました。

rows.en: We cooked curry at home.

rows.en: He always carried a small notebook.

rows.en: I often helped my brother with homework.

rows.en: She usually came home before six.
